title: u36_compatibility
text: u36_compatibility Support LONG/LONG RAW data types in the U6.x connector USYS$ORA_PARAMS = u36_compatibility Use This option applies only to the U6.x connector and above. Description Use with the U6.x connector to add support for LONG/LONG RAW data types, as in the U3.6 connector. The U3.6 connector supported LONG/LONG RAW data type, but not the CLOB/BLOB data type.
